{{Quote|There's a small Republic outpost here. They won't be able to withstand an army that size. Evacuation is our only option.|[[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], to [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]]|<ref name="Game" />}}
The '''Evacuation of Rhen Var''' took place in the first month of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. It was a crushing defeat for the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], despite the fact that the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] was believed unimportant to Republic forces at the time. It was only later that the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]] realized that capturing [[Rhen Var/Legends|Rhen Var]] was the first step in the [[Dark Reaper crisis]].

==Prelude==
While stationed in the [[Tion Cluster/Legends|Tion Cluster]], [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and his Padawan [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] detected a [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] [[Battle group/Legends|battle group]] comprising several [[Lucrehulk-class battleship/Legends|''Lucrehulk''-class battleships]] emerging from [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]]. Equipped with only their own [[Delta-7 Aethersprite-class light interceptor/Legends|Delta-7 starfighters]], the two Jedi were unable to confront the fleet and so decided to instead warn the fleet's intended target, plotting their course to Rhen Var in the [[Tobali system]].

==The evacuation==
Rhen Var was home to a small Republic outpost known as [[Bravo Base]], located not far from where the Separatist army had made planetfall. Incapable of defending against an invasion of that size and magnitude, Kenobi called for transports to evacuate the base's personnel. Upon landing, he helped prepare the base for the evacuation, tasking his Padawan and a [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone trooper]] crew in an [[Low Altitude Assault Transport/infantry/Legends|LAAT/i gunship]] to retrieve the workers of a nearby communications facility that was already under siege when Skywalker arrived. After destroying the CIS [[Armored Assault Tank/Legends|Armored Assault Tanks]] and [[IG-227 Hailfire-class droid tank/Legends|Hailfire droids]], the workers were rushed on board and safely transported to Bravo Base. An inbound convoy of [[Republic Troop Transport/Legends|Republic Troop Transports]] full of clone troopers from the planet's [[Garrison/Legends|garrison]] became Skywalker's next priority. He escorted them to the base, combating Separatist [[Ground Armored Tank|fighter]] and [[Heavy Artillery Gun|mortar]] tanks from the air. Upon the convoy's arrival at the base, Kenobi informed Skywalker of a small Jedi sanctuary caught between the Separatist forces and the base and ordered the extraction of the five Jedi stationed there. Once the Jedi had been recovered and delivered to the base, Skywalker joined in the battle to defend Bravo Base while the evacuation transports lifted off.

After a grueling battle against overpowering forces that only continued to grow larger as more CIS [[C-9979 landing craft/Legends|landing craft]] touched down, the transports managed to flee the planet with Kenobi and Skywalker following shortly as Bravo Base was overwhelmed and subsequently destroyed. The two Jedi responsible for saving its personnel could only report to the [[Jedi Council/Legends|Jedi Council]] that the planet had fallen to the Separatists.

==Aftermath==
Although the outpost was destroyed in this battle, the Republic later [[Battle of Rhen Var (Clone Wars)|returned]] in search of the ancient Jedi [[Ulic Qel-Droma/Legends|Ulic Qel-Droma's]] [[Jedi monument (Rhen Var)|tomb]]. Unfortunately, [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]] had already discovered Qel-Droma's burial site, and had received guidance from his [[Force ghost/Legends|spirit]], in the process learning where the [[Force Harvester]] was buried—[[Raxus Prime/Legends|Raxus Prime]].
